subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter thou hadst written to Áqá Mírzá Muḥsin was reviewed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بآقا میرزا محسن مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @praise and encouragement, @relationship between government and people
